The '''Boonta Training Course''' was a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] circuit on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Like the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] podrace, it began at the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] and took a route through the desert, albeit a drastically less arduous one than Boonta Eve. This course was the first race in the [[Amateur Podracing Circuit]] tournament. [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] favored this course.

==Other tracks of Tatooine==
*[[Galactic Podracing Circuit/Legends|Galactic Circuit]] track: [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Classic]]

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] {{1st}}
